name: Java Naming Convention
description: Checks if Java class names start with an uppercase letter.
message: Java class name should start with an uppercase letter.
suggestion: Rename the class to start with an uppercase letter.

name: System.out.println
description: Detects use of System.out.println in Java.
message: Consider using a Logger instead of System.out.println.
suggestion: Use a logging framework like SLF4J or java.util.logging for production code.

name: Hardcoded Credentials
description: Detects potential hardcoded passwords or tokens in Java.
suggestion: Store credentials in environment variables or a secure vault.

name: Missing Semicolon (Java)
description: Detects missing semicolons at the end of statements in Java.
suggestion: Add a semicolon at the end of the statement.

name: Assignment in Condition
description: Detects assignment (=) instead of comparison (==) in if/while conditions.
message: Potential Syntax Error: Assignment '=' used in condition.
suggestion: Use '==' for comparison inside the condition.

name: Unresolved TODOs
message: Unresolved TODO or FIXME comments found.
suggestion: Address the pending task or remove the comment if it's no longer relevant.
